---
title: "University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group"
image: "media/logo_small.png"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/uob-rug

---


Welcome to the University of Birmingham R User Group!

👉 **Official University page**  

[https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/research/arc/bear/user-groups/r-user-group](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/research/arc/bear/user-groups/r-user-group)

This GitHub site hosts code, examples, workshops, and materials for our community.
